---
format: html
---

# Soil Microbial Data Qiime2 Pipeline Commands

Two folders labeled as soil_microbial_original and soil-microbial-work

**soil_microbial_original** original sequences

**soil-microbial-work/qiime_workflow** active working directory with data with associate working directories

-- metadata

-- results

- results/visualizations


Created a directory to place all associated data
```bash
mkdir qiime_workflow
```

Activated conda environment
```bash
conda activate qiime2_v2024.10.1
```

uploaded updated metadata file (see metadata_clean.py)
```bash
qiime metadata tabulate \
  --m-input-file metadata/Nachusa_16s_all_metadata_edited2.tsv \
  --o-visualization metadata-output/soil-metadata-viz.qzv
```
import single end forward sequences
```bash
qiime tools import \
--type MultiplexedSingleEndBarcodeInSequence \
--input-path /mnt/HDD/samanthag/soil-microbial-original/01id01NB_S1_R1_001.fastq.gz \
--output-path ./results/multiplexed-seqs.qza
```

```bash
qiime cutadapt demux-single \
  --p-cores 16 \
  --i-seqs multiplexed-seqs.qza \
  --m-barcodes-file ../metadata/Nachusa_16s_all_metadata_edited2.tsv \
  --m-barcodes-column barcode \
  --p-error-rate 0   \
  --o-per-sample-sequences demultiplexed-seqs.qza \
  --o-untrimmed-sequences untrimmed-seqs.qza \
  --verbose
```
